name: Flux Power Holdings, Inc.
business: The company designs, develops, manufactures, and sells a portfolio of advanced lithium-ion energy storage solutions for electrification of industrial and commercial sectors, including material handling and airport ground support equipment. They also offer a proprietary wireless battery management system and telemetry solution.

exposures.sentence: We design, develop, manufacture, and sell a portfolio of advanced lithium-ion energy storage solutions for electrification of a range of industrial and commercial sectors which include material handling and airport ground support equipment ( GSE ).

We design, develop, manufacture, and sell a portfolio of advanced lithium-ion energy storage solutions for electrification of a range of industrial and commercial sectors which include material handling and airport ground support equipment ( GSE ).

We design, develop, manufacture, and sell a portfolio of advanced lithium-ion energy storage solutions for electrification of a range of industrial and commercial sectors which include material handling and airport ground support equipment ( GSE ).

The technology behind these patents is designed to: increase battery life by optimizing the charging cycle, give users a better understanding of the health of their battery in use, and apply artificial intelligence to predictively balance the cells for optimal performance.
Natural product extensions, based on our modular, scalable designs, include solar backup power for electric vehicle ( EV ) mobile charging stations and robotic warehouse equipment.
Natural product extensions, based on our modular, scalable designs, include solar backup power for electric vehicle ( EV ) mobile charging stations and robotic warehouse equipment.
We also announced a new partnership aimed at enhancing the recycling process for end-of-life lithium-ion batteries with the largest critical battery components recycling company in the U.S.

catalysts.event: Introduction of G96 higher-voltage battery system for airline and aviation industry
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2025, we introduced the G96, a higher-voltage battery system with greater capacity for intensive applications in the Airline and Aviation industry and improved the developed G80 design that simplifies maintenance and enhances usability for GSE.

catalysts.event: Addition of second tier one OEM private label battery program with UL Type EE certification
catalysts.sentence: We recently have added our second tier one OEM private label battery program to supplement our strong OEM relationships and approvals.

tamClaims.claim: The material handling sector is a multi-billion-dollar addressable market.
tamClaims.sentence: Our largest sector of penetration thus far has been the material handling sector, which we believe is a multi-billion-dollar addressable market.

tamClaims.claim: New lift truck sales reached approximately 2.1 million units worldwide in 2023, with 431,000 units in the Americas.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Worldwide Industrial Truck Statistics ( WITS ), new lift truck sales reached approximately 2.1 million units worldwide in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Electric products represented approximately 67% of North American lift truck shipments in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: The International Truck Association ( ITA ) estimates that electric products represented approximately sixty-seven percent (67%) of the North American shipments in 2023, reflecting the long-term trend of increasing mix of electric products versus internal combustion (propane) engines.

tamClaims.claim: The global lift truck market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.7% from 2024 through 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Driven by growth in global manufacturing, e-commerce and construction, Research and Markets expects that the global lift truck market will grow at a compound annual growth rate of 5.7% from 2024 through 2030.
